docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PER 1033CCP(B)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACOSTA, JOSE $2,780.55 PRINCIPAL, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $76.54 INTEREST, $151.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,608.09
